Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No Appearances:
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GEORGE HONG's Motion To Quash Service is DENIED. Subservice on Jackie Tam plus mailing constitutes valid substitute service both as a service on a competent member of household and on a person apparently in charge of the usual mailing address. The prevailing party to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances Tentative ruling is as follows

DEFENDANT GEORGE HONG'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1005. Motion filed on November 20, 2014 and set for hearing December 1, 2014. Opposing party and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Continued To Jan-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
